title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Prevents transformations from feeling
content:
✔ Prevents transformations from feeling random or unearned.

📜 2. Reverse of Fortune Weekly Chaos Events

📜 New ways to create chaos & shift class power dynamics.

✔ How Chaos Events Work:
• Every week, a Wheel of Fortune-style event occurs.
• Some weeks, it’s purely random. Other weeks, it’s activated by player decisions.
• Events pull from a bank of thematically relevant chaos mechanics.

✔ Examples of Weekly Chaos Events:
1️⃣ The Monkey’s Paw – A wish is granted, but at a severe cost.
2️⃣ Rags to Riches – The lowest-ranked player swaps places with the highest.
3️⃣ The Great Betrayal – A secret faction member is forced to reveal their loyalty shift.
4️⃣ The Unwritten Page – A portion of the class rules are erased & rewritten by vote.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 492 (chunk 492/555)
